title: Get Graphic Overrides for Element IDs in View
description: Get the graphics/appearance/painted (colors and pattern ids) for a list of element ids (not types, not families, ...) and their corresponding categories in a view. High priority layer for graphics in the view. Do not use with elements in linked documents.

view_id.description: The ID of the view to query overrides from.

element_ids.description: List of element IDs to get graphic overrides for.
